findings.description: The 3× throughput differential for payloads under 10MB is now cited but the magnitude remains architecturally unusual for small payloads. At skepticism 2, benefit of the doubt applies given the citation — noting at low for awareness.
findings.evidence: "batch processing achieves 3× higher throughput than record-by-record streaming for payloads under 10MB due to reduced per-record overhead." Benchmark cited but specific bottleneck not named.
findings.suggestion: Optionally name the specific bottleneck driving the 3× differential (e.g., connection overhead, serialization, network round-trips).
